[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2015-06-11
[TITLE]: Increased risk of lightning in big cities - Scandasia
[METADATA/INTRO]: This week, Bangkok experienced a wave of lightning, and torrential overnight rain left the city flooded. The monsoon season in Thailand has begun, and looking at the weather forecast more lightning will strike the city the next couple of days....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: This week, Bangkok experienced a wave of lightning, and torrential overnight rain left the city flooded. The monsoon season in Thailand has begun, and looking at the weather forecast more lightning will strike the city the next couple of days. 
 “City planners, meteorologists and citizens who live in or near large urban areas should be aware of the increased risk. These storms can produce dangerous weather hazards, including lightning, hail, strong winds and flash floods, often with little or no warning.” 
 Said Alex Haberlie to Phys Org earlier this year. He is a Northern Illinois University Ph.D. student in geography and lead author of a recent study published in the Quarterly Journal of the Royal Meteorological Society.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Panama City - Charging the Night Sky - Thunderstorms over Panama City
[METADATA/INTRO]: Panama City, Panama 7-22 June 2023...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Such storms, while disruptive at times, are a blessing for photographers like me. Powerful flashes of lightning transform the city, casting it in a different, more dramatic light. Every flash, every thunderclap tells a story of a city that stands resilient, even when nature unleashes its full force. 
 The Art and Challenge of Capturing Lightning 
 Photographing lightning is as much about patience and anticipation as it is about technique. At its core, the process requires a long shutter speed to capture the fleeting brilliance of a lightning bolt. A sturdy tripod is non-negotiable; it ensures that your shot remains steady, especially during those extended exposures. Lens choice can vary based on the situation. While a wide-angle lens is perfect for capturing vast landscapes illuminated by the storm, a zoom lens becomes invaluable when the storm is distant or for achieving specific compositions.
